name: obsidian-sample-plugin
description: This is a sample plugin for Obsidian (https://obsidian.md)

scripts.dev: tsc --noEmit && node esbuild.config.mjs &&  powershell  Write-Host " Ts Compiled " -BackgroundColor darkblue
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json
scripts.build:sass: sass  --no-source-map _styles/styles.scss:plugin/styles.css &&  powershell  Write-Host " SASS Compiled " -BackgroundColor darkmagenta
scripts.watch:sass: npm run build:sass && onchange "**/*.scss"    -- npm run build:sass
scripts.watch:ts: npm run dev && onchange "**/*.ts?(x)" "../.sharedModules/**/*.(t|j)s?(x)"  -- npm run dev
